rawFields.title: Amazon Basics Vanity Mirror with Heavy Base - 1X/5X Magnification, White
rawFields.sku_description:
360 degree rotating double-sided mirror for placing on vanity or countertop
1x and 5x magnification mirrors ideal for up-close grooming, makeup application, skincare, and more
Durable, substantial iron-coated construction
Extra heavy base helps prevent tipping and assures stability
Crystal clear reflection with mirror diameter of 6.69 inches
White finish; clean with a dry cloth, do not use solvent-based cleaners
